testcase.name: Should short-circuit allOf() with suppliers on first failure
Should chain outcomes with OR logic - success or failure
Should demonstrate that anyOf convenience overload evaluates all arguments
Should short-circuit chained or() calls on first success
Should use allOf for all successful outcomes
Should short-circuit anyOf() with suppliers on first success
Should use anyOf for multiple OR operations
Should use allOf for multiple AND operations
Should chain outcomes with AND logic - success and success
Should chain outcomes with OR logic - failure or success
Should chain outcomes with AND logic - failure and success
Should short-circuit chained and() calls on first failure
Should provide convenience methods for checking outcome type
Should chain outcomes with AND logic - success and failure
Should chain outcomes with OR logic - failure or failure returns last
Should chain outcomes with AND logic - failure and failure returns first
Should use anyOf for all failed outcomes
Should demonstrate that allOf convenience overload evaluates all arguments
